recommendations.title: La matassa
recommendations.overview: Two cousins haven't spoken for almost twenty years, thanks to the enmity that their fathers feel toward one another. But an accident suddenly brings the cousins back together and thrusts them deep into the heart of the mafia.
recommendations.director: Salvatore Ficarra, Valentino Picone, Giambattista Avellino

recommendations.title: Let's Go to the Country
recommendations.overview: Valentino and Salvo, unemployed and in search of fortune and recommendation, leave Palermo for Valentino’s home town, Monteforte, where they will try to survive the Italian crisis by opening some sort of hospice.

recommendations.title: It’s the Law
recommendations.overview: A small Sicilian town elects a new, honest major but quickly learns that playing by the rules is not as easy as it seems.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in Bethlehem
recommendations.overview: A thief and a priest end up magically transported in the year 0's Palestine, where they'll have to make sure that the Nativity will follow its course.

recommendations.title: Anche se è amore non si vede
recommendations.overview: Salvo and Valentino are two Sicilian friends who have moved to Turin, and now run a small business together. They drive foreign tourists around in a double-decker bus, and Salvo always tries to approach the pretty girls.

recommendations.title: Un Natale per due
recommendations.overview: An Italian style remake of "Due Date".

recommendations.title: Some Say No
recommendations.overview: Some Say No is a new Italian comedy with a very serious subject: the way the country's society is corroded by favoritism that pushes inferior people to the top in virtually every field. In Florence, three thirty-somethings band together to wage their

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in America
recommendations.overview: A former Prohibition-era Jewish gangster returns to the Lower East Side of Manhattan over thirty years later, where he once again must confront the ghosts and regrets of his old life.

recommendations.title: The Traitor
recommendations.overview: Palermo, Sicily, 1980. Mafia member Tommaso Buscetta decides to move to Brazil with his family fleeing the constant war between the different clans of the criminal organization. But when, after living several misfortunes, he is forced to return to It

recommendations.title: Ask Me If I'm Happy
recommendations.overview: Aspiring thespians Aldo, Giovanni and Giacomo work dead-end jobs while nurturing their dream production of Cyrano de Bergerac, until love for the same woman tears their friendship apart. Three years later, Giovanni and Giacomo reunite after learning
recommendations.director: Massimo Venier, Giacomo Poretti, Aldo Baglio, Giovanni Storti
